name: China Merchants Fund Management Co. - Csi Coal and Consumable Fund
summary: China Merchants Fund Management Co. - Csi Coal and Consumable Fund is a fund that tracks the CSI Coal and Consumable Fuels Index, providing exposure to companies in the coal and consumable fuels industry in China. The fund aims to replicate the performance of the index through passive investment strategies. It is managed by China Merchants Fund Management Co., Ltd., a Chinese asset management firm.
